headline: Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) Faces More Hurdles After DOJ Clears $111 Billion Deal
summary: The Department of Justice has approved Paramount's planned $111b acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery. The deal still faces opposition from some state attorneys general, regulators in the EU and UK, and consumer lawsuits. Investors are watching how the combined company could reshape competition in film, TV, and streaming. Warner Bros. Discovery (NasdaqGS:WBD) enters this phase of the deal with a current share price of $26.24 and a 1 year return of 148.2%, while the 3 year return is 112.1%...
